entities.name: Incantum
entities.context: Natural language trigger system that invokes N5 commands via spoken/typed phrases

entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's personal automation and command system with multiple subsystems (lists, knowledge, CRM, git, docs)

entities.name: Lists System
entities.context: N5 subsystem for managing lists with add, find, export, and health-check commands

entities.name: Knowledge System
entities.context: N5 subsystem for knowledge management with add, find, and ingest capabilities

entities.name: Thread Management
entities.context: N5 subsystem for conversation lifecycle management including close and export functions

entities.name: CRM
entities.context: N5 subsystem for contact and company relationship management with search capabilities

entities.name: Git Audit
entities.context: N5 subsystem for git repository health checks and auditing

relationships.context: Incantum provides natural language interface that triggers N5 commands
Lists is a subsystem within N5
Knowledge management is a subsystem within N5
Thread/conversation management is a subsystem within N5
CRM is a subsystem within N5
Git auditing is a subsystem within N5
